# Add UI Component Library & Theme

Create a shared component library and theme to keep UI consistent across apps.

## Tasks

- Implement a `ui` package exposing buttons, modals, tables, styles, and TranslateProvider.
- Add global theme tokens (colors, fonts) and base styles.
- Update frontends to import shared components.

## Rationale

Shared UI reduces duplication and accelerates building consistent interfaces.

Suggested labels: frontend, enhancement
